_comment: REVIEW mode — turn a file into a sharpened, triaged DEFECT LIST to hand to a coding agent (e.g. Claude Code), not a rewrite. Claude writes the review; Gemini (OpenRouter) and Codex (local) cross-check it for missed/mis-graded defects. The output is the brief; you apply it elsewhere with full repo context + tests. Needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY for the Gemini reviewer (swap that block to a local CLI if you prefer). The `mode: review` key makes this the default — no --mode flag needed. Run: node orchestrate.mjs --config agents.review.json --file path\to\file --rounds 4

proposer.name: Reviewer (Claude via OpenRouter)
proposer.system: You are a rigorous, concrete senior reviewer. You name defects precisely — location, the input or condition that triggers them, and the fix direction — and you never rewrite or reproduce the artifact. Order by severity.
